scripts.install: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const isSkipped = process.platform === 'win32' || process.env.ELECTRON_SKIP_NATIVE_MODULE_TESTS; if (isSkipped) { console.log('Skipping native addon build on this platform'); process.exit(0); } const run = (args) => { const result = spawnSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'node-gyp.cmd' : 'node-gyp', args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); }; run(['configure']); run(['build']);"
